title: Badgers beat visiting Rhinos
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Two comprehensive victories - both by an innings - in their first two matches in the Cricket SA Division 2 Four-day Series has put the Garden Route Badgers in a commanding position.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Two comprehensive victories - both by an innings - in their first two matches in the Cricket SA Division 2 Four-day Series has put the Garden Route Badgers in a commanding position."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At home, the Badgers wiped the Mpumalanga Rhinos out of their way with a victory by an innings and 12 runs at the Rec in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers, who won the toss, put the Rhinos into bat.","html":"The Badgers, who won the toss, put the Rhinos into bat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to a five-wicket haul in debut by Zack Momberg (5/54), the visitors from Mbombela slumped from 199/3 to 264 all out.","html":"Thanks to a five-wicket haul in debut by Zack Momberg (5/54), the visitors from Mbombela slumped from 199/3 to 264 all out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A fine performance by the batting unit of the home side enabled the Badgers to score 510 all out in their first innings. Kyle Jacobs (122 from 160 balls; 17x4) and the captain, Yaseen Valli (110 from 225 balls; 9x4), both scored centuries, while Ruan Terblanche 89 (2x6, 10x4) and George van Heerden 79 (9x4) both missed out on century landmarks.","html":"A fine performance by the batting unit of the home side enabled the Badgers to score 510 all out in their first innings. Kyle Jacobs (122 from 160 balls; 17x4) and the captain, Yaseen Valli (110 from 225 balls; 9x4), both scored centuries, while Ruan Terblanche 89 (2x6, 10x4) and George van Heerden 79 (9x4) both missed out on century landmarks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In their second innings, the Rhinos managed to score 234 (all out). Banele Cele (4/24) and Lian Alder (4/69) bagged four wickets each.","html":"In their second innings, the Rhinos managed to score 234 (all out). Banele Cele (4/24) and Lian Alder (4/69) bagged four wickets each."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eastern Storm, at 53.72 points after three matches, is the log leader, with the Badgers in second position at 49.10 points after only two matches.","html":"Eastern Storm, at 53.72 points after three matches, is the log leader, with the Badgers in second position at 49.10 points after only two matches."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Knights at 46.28 points, also after two matches, are third."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers will now shift their focus to white-ball cricket with the T20 series that will kick off against Limpopo Impala in Polokwane tomorrow, 25 October.","html":"The Badgers will now shift their focus to white-ball cricket with the T20 series that will kick off against Limpopo Impala in Polokwane tomorrow, 25 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecard:","html":"The summarised scorecard:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mpumalanga Rhinos: 1st innings, 264 all out (Benjamin van Niekerk 68, Yassar Cook 46, Karabo Mogotsi 44, Zack Momberg 5/54, Banele Cele 3/53) and 2nd innings, 234 all out (Gareth Dukes 84*, Benjamin van Niekerk 55, Liam Alder 4/69, Banele Cele 4/24, Sintu Majiza 2/28).","html":"Mpumalanga Rhinos: 1st innings, 264 all out (Benjamin van Niekerk 68, Yassar Cook 46, Karabo Mogotsi 44, Zack Momberg 5/54, Banele Cele 3/53) and 2nd innings, 234 all out (Gareth Dukes 84*, Benjamin van Niekerk 55, Liam Alder 4/69, Banele Cele 4/24, Sintu Majiza 2/28)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers: 1st innings, 510 all out (Kyle Jacobs 122, Yaseen Valli 110, Ruan Terblanche 89, George van Heerden 79, Kurtlyn Mannikam 7/169).","html":"Garden Route Badgers: 1st innings, 510 all out (Kyle Jacobs 122, Yaseen Valli 110, Ruan Terblanche 89, George van Heerden 79, Kurtlyn Mannikam 7/169)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers won by an innings and 12 runs.","html":"Garden Route Badgers won by an innings and 12 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
